hero.title: New York-style Bagels in The Hague
hero.subtitle: Handmade, boiled, baked fresh daily

about.heading:
No-Nonsense
New York Bagels
about.p1: Since 2020, we've been bringing authentic New York-style bagels to The Hague. Our bagels are hand-rolled, boiled, and baked fresh daily using traditional methods and 100% halal, natural ingredients.
about.p2: We combine New York's straightforward approach with Dutch warmth, creating a space where everyone feels welcome. No shortcuts, no compromises—just honest, delicious bagels made the way they should be.

menuHighlight.heading: New Fresh Summer Menu
menuHighlight.subtitle: Discover our new seasonal menu. Fresh ingredients, bold flavors — handcrafted daily.

menuPreview.heading: Our Menu
menuPreview.subtitle: Discover our selection of handcrafted bagels and more

savory.label: Savory
savory.description: Classic bagel sandwiches with fresh ingredients

catering.heading: Catering
catering.subtitle: Bring the taste of New York to your next event. We offer catering packages for all occasions.

jobs.heading: Join Our Team
jobs.subtitle: We're always looking for passionate people who love food and hospitality. If you want to be part of our team, we'd love to hear from you.

menuPage.heading: Our Menu
menuPage.subtitle: Handcrafted with love, baked fresh daily
menuPage.allergiesText: Please inform us of any allergies before ordering. Our kitchen is NOT safe for celiacs. All our products are 100% halal. Prices may vary — please check in-store for the latest menu.

metadata.title: Menu | Netherlands Bagels
metadata.description: Explore our full menu: savory bagel sandwiches, sweet treats, loose bagels, drinks and catering options. All 100% halal.

metadata.title: Netherlands Bagels | New York-Style Bagels in The Hague
metadata.description: Freshly baked New York-style bagels in The Hague. Dine in, takeaway and catering. 100% Halal.
